title: Task
description: Defines the lifecycle of an orchestration task from creation through completion, including assignment, locking, and completion signaling.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task. Format: task-NNN or task-NNN-label.

session_id.description: Identifier of the orchestration session this task belongs to.

title.description: Short human-readable title for the task.

description.description: Detailed description of what the task entails.

github_issue_number.description: Associated GitHub issue number, if any.

stage.description: Current lifecycle stage of the task.

primary.description: Agent ID of the primary assignee responsible for completing the task.

secondary.description: Agent IDs of secondary assignees providing support.

locked_by.description: Agent ID that currently holds an exclusive lock on this task. Null when unlocked.

locked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the lock was acquired. Null when unlocked.

rereview_count.description: Number of times this task has been sent back for re-review.

completion_signal.description: Signal emitted by an agent upon completing the task.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent that completed the task.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was completed.

artifacts.description: List of artifact paths or identifiers produced by the task.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent update to the task.
